Name: Lick-Wilmerding High School
About: Lick-Wilmerding High School not only prepares its students to thrive in college but also is committed to being a 'private school with public purpose'. Through the Center for Civic Engagement, LWHS offers opportunities for students to participate in programs related to social justice and equity, service learning, and student leadership.
Philosophy: We are so excited for you to learn more about our vibrant and dynamic learning community. I hope that through this site you will see the many ways in which we live our mission through our commitment to public purpose, the many ways we foster community, and our robust academic and arts curricula.
Outcomes: Lick-Wilmerding High School graduates are accepted into top-tier universities such as Stanford, UC Berkeley, and Ivy League institutions. Alumni often pursue successful careers in diverse fields, including technology, arts, and social justice initiatives.
Admissions: Prospective students must submit an online application, including transcripts and teacher recommendations, by early January. The admissions process also includes an interview and standardized testing, with decisions typically released in March.
Quote: Empower your mind and heart to serve others, shaping a future where justice and equity thrive.

Performance.Academic Integration: Architecture classes teach green building design and practices, and the shops are incorporating eco-design and recycling/reuse principles in the curriculum.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: LWHS strives to cultivate a diverse, collaborative community of students and adults that is rooted in empathy, equity, respect, humility, and accountability. We commit to upholding the tenets of anti-racism and to interrupt all forms of interpersonal and institutional bias and discrimination.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Lick-Wilmerding High School's faculty includes experienced educators with advanced degrees, many of whom hold certifications in their respective fields, such as National Board Certification and specialized training in arts and sciences.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates often gain admission to prestigious institutions like Stanford and Ivy League schools, with many students receiving recognition in national competitions such as the National Merit Scholarship Program.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including a fully equipped theater, modern science labs, and dedicated art studios, providing students with ample resources for creative and academic exploration.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through comprehensive progress reports and regular parent-teacher conferences, ensuring transparent communication and personalized feedback to support each student's academic journey.

Name: Town School for Boys
Tagline: Town School for Boys, located in San Francisco, California, is an independent day school for boys from kindergarten through the eighth grade.
About: Town School for Boys is anchored in more than 80 years of educational excellence, and our daily morning greetings are a longstanding and beloved tradition. Grounding our days from a place of connection enables faculty and students alike to bring our best selves each day.
Philosophy: At Town School, learning is prized, love of school is essential and boyhood is celebrated. Town graduates approach the world with deep curiosity.
Outcomes: Town School for Boys graduates are well-prepared for top high schools in the Bay Area and beyond. Alumni often excel in academics, athletics, and leadership roles, reflecting the school's commitment to holistic development.
Admissions: Prospective families can apply online through the school's website, with applications typically due in early winter. The admissions process includes a campus tour, student assessment, and family interview to ensure a good fit.
Quote: At Town School, learning is prized, love of school is essential and boyhood is celebrated.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: Since opening its doors in 2018, Town’s Dolby Family Center for the Performing Arts has become a central hub on campus for arts, education, community gatherings, sports, and more. With professional-level sound and lights and a dynamic ability to shift from a seated auditorium for 400 people to a basketball court or mixed-use space within three hours, the Dolby brings our campus to life in new ways each year.
Performance.Academic Integration: Town’s Engineering Thinking Program empowers K-8 students to think like engineers, combining hands-on projects, cross-subject learning, and creative problem-solving to prepare them for real-world challenges.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: In 2023, Town opened the doors of the Engineering Studio, providing a new and purpose-built space for our pioneering Engineering Thinking Program. Led by a dedicated Engineering Program Lead, the program is intentionally woven into the K-8 curriculum across subjects, with the goal of graduating students who are able to apply the mindset and skillset of professional engineers to any academic, professional, or personal path they might take.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Complementing this work, our Parents’ Association’s Community Impact Committee facilitates additional service opportunities for students and their families as well as faculty and staff.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Town School for Boys graduates are frequently admitted to prestigious high schools such as Lick-Wilmerding, University High School, and St. Ignatius College Preparatory. Alumni have also achieved accolades in regional science fairs and state-level athletic competitions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The school utilizes a comprehensive assessment system, providing detailed progress reports to parents three times a year. Regular parent-teacher conferences ensure transparent communication about each student's academic and social development.

Name: The Urban School of San Francisco
Tagline: Home - Urban School of San Francisco
About: We’re glad you have found our virtual home. Though no website can truly convey the fullness or the distinctiveness of the Urban experience, it’s our hope that you start gaining a feel for how we think about education and the role you play in it.
Philosophy: Urban School of San Francisco seeks to ignite a passion for learning, inspiring its students to become self-motivated, enthusiastic participants in their education – both in high school and beyond. Learning is an active, joyful process of discovery where students are challenged to ask essential questions, solve problems in disciplined and creative ways, and construct substantive understandings under the guidance of passionate and inspiring teachers.
Outcomes: Urban School graduates are accepted into top-tier universities such as Stanford, UC Berkeley, and Harvard. Alumni pursue successful careers in diverse fields, including technology, arts, and public service.
Admissions: Prospective students must submit an online application, including transcripts and recommendations, by the January deadline. Interviews and campus visits are part of the holistic admissions process, emphasizing a student's fit with Urban's community and values.
Quote: At Urban, we have an unflinching belief in the power of adolescence.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Urban School curriculum provides an exceptionally strong foundation in college preparatory subjects. Many of our classes have distinctive features that set them apart as particularly challenging and comparable to college level work.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Urban’s academic program seeks to involve students in their broader community — the school, the city, the world — and develop in them a sense of social responsibility. Beyond a core curriculum that builds a firm framework of general knowledge and conceptual understanding in each of the disciplines, the Urban program gives students the opportunity to develop deep knowledge and fluency with skills and ways of thinking across disciplines.
Performance.Academic Integration: Urban’s curriculum is extensive and inclusive, including core academic classes, as well as an unusually large number of specialized courses, advanced electives and creative arts courses usually found at the college level. See our 2025-26 Curriculum Guide here.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from The Urban School of San Francisco are consistently admitted to prestigious universities like Stanford and UC Berkeley, often receiving accolades in national academic competitions. Alumni excel in fields such as technology, arts, and public service.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Urban School boasts state-of-the-art science labs, a fully equipped theater, and dedicated art studios, fostering a dynamic learning environment. Students also benefit from access to modern athletic facilities and collaborative workspaces.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The Urban School utilizes a comprehensive assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences to ensure student success. Personalized feedback is provided to guide students in achieving their academic goals.

Name: San Francisco University High School
About: At UHS, we embrace education as a transformational experience, empowering our students to invent and sustain their own vision of success and sense of purpose, while also prioritizing wellness and self-care. They, in turn, grow into motivated learners and creators, excited to make their mark on the world.
Philosophy: At San Francisco University High School, we engage our community of diverse voices in a transformational experience that embraces the spirited pursuit of learning and empowers purpose larger than self. INQUIRY | Being curious, open-minded, and courageous; Seeking out different perspectives and learning from one another; Striving to deepen our understanding of the evolving world.
Outcomes: San Francisco University High School graduates consistently attend top-tier universities, including Ivy League institutions. Alumni often excel in diverse fields such as technology, arts, and public service, reflecting the school's commitment to holistic education and personal growth.
Admissions: If this sounds like a place where you could grow, your next step in this journey is to create a Student Profile on Ravenna-Hub, where you can access our application materials as well as register for admissions events. We look forward to getting to know you through this process.
Quote: Explore the legacy, renovation, and expansion of our city campus.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: Upper Campus on Jackson Street is the academic and administrative heart of UHS. The original home of UHS, Upper houses the History, English, and Responsive Education Departments, as well as the offices of College Counseling, Communications, Development, and the Head of School.
Performance.Academic Integration: Performing arts are a cornerstone of the UHS curriculum, with many students completing the equivalent of six years of performing arts courses during their four years at the school. With the expansion of the California Campus came the opportunity to reimagine the area behind the theater in Middle Campus.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: San Francisco University High School boasts faculty with advanced degrees from prestigious institutions and extensive experience in their fields, including National Board Certified Teachers and coaches with over a decade of expertise in youth development.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently secure placements at Ivy League universities and have been recipients of national academic awards, reflecting the school's dedication to fostering excellence and preparing students for competitive higher education environments.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art science labs, a fully equipped theater, and a modern athletic complex, including a swimming pool and tennis courts, supporting a diverse range of student interests and activities.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The school employs a comprehensive assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences, ensuring transparent communication and personalized feedback to support student growth and achievement.

Name: The Hamlin School
Tagline: o meet the challenges of their time and inspires them to become extraordinary thinkers and innovators, courageous leaders, and individuals of integrity.
About: Welcome to The Hamlin School website, and thank you very much for taking the time to explore our magnificent school for girls. We have been on the same mission since 1896, when our courageous founder Sarah Dix Hamlin established a school where girls and young women would be “educated to meet the challenges of their time.” Indeed, the challenges we are seeing locally, nationally, and globally are numerous and immense, and our professional community and Board of Trustees remain steadfast in our collective commitment to ensure that Hamlin girls step forward as courageous leaders.
Philosophy: Sarah Dix Hamlin’s pioneering spirit continues to infuse the school today as our girls are taught to voice their ideas, questions, and opinions and to use their critical and creative thinking skills to transform their communities. Frequent opportunities for leadership and public speaking, competitive athletics and physical education, annual excursions to San Francisco City Hall, Sacramento, and Washington D.C., service learning, outdoor adventures, and the teaching of ethical values are integral to our program and complement the rigorous study of literature, social studies, mathematics, science, Spanish, and the arts.
Outcomes: Hamlin graduates are well-prepared for top-tier high schools and universities, with many attending prestigious institutions. Students frequently excel in leadership roles and community service, reflecting the school's emphasis on ethical values and critical thinking.
Admissions: We look forward to welcoming you to campus for our “sneak peek” Spring Tour ahead of the admission season this fall. Our amazing Grade 8 students, the true experts on all things Hamlin, will personally guide you through campus and share their unique perspectives on life at Hamlin.
Quote: Empowering girls to lead with courage, compassion, and creativity in a world of endless possibilities.
AppDeadline: in mid-March when decision letters are mailed by independent

Performance.Student Wellbeing: With Hamlin students coming and going from 40 different zip codes, each family has unique transportation needs. To foster an inclusive community, we offer a dedicated morning bus program that ensures transportation to and from our beautiful school is never a barrier to investing in your daughter’s excellent education.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Hamlin's faculty includes experienced educators with advanced degrees and certifications in their respective fields, ensuring a high-quality teaching environment. Many teachers have over a decade of experience in girls' education.
Performance.Academic Integration: The Hamlin School offers a robust curriculum including advanced courses in STEM, humanities, and the arts, utilizing project-based learning and interdisciplinary approaches. Spanish language instruction is integrated from an early age.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of The Hamlin School frequently attend prestigious high schools such as Lick-Wilmerding and University High School. They often receive awards in regional science fairs and national writing competitions.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art science labs, a performing arts theater, and an expansive library. Athletic facilities include a gymnasium, outdoor sports fields, and a swimming pool.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is monitored through regular assessments and bi-annual detailed progress reports. The school maintains strong communication with parents through conferences and an online portal for tracking academic performance.

Name: Bay Club
Tagline: Discover Bay Club: Premier fitness, sports, and social clubs in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and the Pacific Northwest. From state-of-the-art fitness centers to family-friendly pools, tennis courts, an
About: Bay Club offers a comprehensive lifestyle experience with state-of-the-art fitness facilities, sports amenities, and social events. It stands out for its family-friendly environment and diverse offerings across multiple locations in California and the Pacific Northwest.
Philosophy: Bay Club believes in promoting a balanced lifestyle through fitness, sports, and social engagement. They provide personalized coaching and a wide range of activities to cater to all ages and fitness levels.
Outcomes: Members of Bay Club benefit from improved physical health, enhanced social connections, and access to a supportive community. The club's diverse programs help individuals achieve personal wellness goals and foster lifelong healthy habits.
Admissions: Members and non-members can enroll, and members always enjoy a 25% savings. Registration for all camp sessions can be done through the Bay Club Connectapp, available to both members and non-members.
Quote: Elevate your life with community, wellness, and adventure at the heart of every moment.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: We’d like to invite you to visit a club so we can learn about what matters most to you and so you can discover what it’s like to be a part of our unique community. Fill in your information below and we’ll get in touch to schedule your visit.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: We’ve completed a full locker room renovation and opened our brand-new 12,000-square-foot fitness atrium, along with our refreshed gymnasium that now accommodates basketball, volleyball, futsal, badminton, pickleball, floor hockey, and more. And squash, a cornerstone of our Santa Clara community, is even better with the addition of two new courts, making this a 6-court squash center!
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Bay Club's coaches hold certifications from organizations like NASM and ACE, with many possessing over a decade of experience in specialized sports training. They excel in personalized fitness plans and adaptive coaching techniques.
Performance.Academic Integration: Bay Club integrates wellness education with workshops on nutrition and mental health, emphasizing holistic development. Their curriculum includes specialized classes like yoga for stress reduction and strength training fundamentals.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Bay Club athletes have achieved recognition in regional competitions, with several members securing scholarships to top universities. The club's focus on skill development prepares athletes for collegiate-level sports.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Bay Club employs a digital tracking system to monitor member progress, offering regular feedback through personalized reports. Members receive monthly updates on fitness goals and performance metrics via the Bay Club Connect app.

Name: Presidio Golf Course & Academy
Tagline: Located within a national park, San Francisco’s Presidio Golf Course is renowned for its spectacular forest setting, as well as its challenging play.
About: It was built in 1895 when Colonel William M. Graham, the Presidio’s commander at the time, allowed a group of businessmen known as the San Francisco Golf and Country Club to create a nine-hole course within the post.
Philosophy: Presidio Golf Course & Academy emphasizes a blend of tradition and innovation, fostering a love for the game through personalized coaching. They believe in developing both technical skills and strategic thinking in a serene natural setting.
Outcomes: Members and students of Presidio Golf Course & Academy often achieve improved handicaps and enhanced enjoyment of the game. The academy's focus on skill development leads to personal growth and lifelong engagement with golf.
Admissions: To enroll at Presidio Golf Course & Academy, interested individuals should visit their website for detailed information on membership options and lesson packages. Applications are accepted year-round, with flexible scheduling to accommodate diverse needs.
Quote: Where history and nature converge, discover your journey to mastery and serenity on the fairways.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Presidio Players Club is our membership program, fostering an inclusive community of golfers focused on promoting participation in public golf. The Club provides dedicated golfers with exclusive benefits, a rewards program and opportunities to engage with a passionate golf community.
Performance.Academic Integration: **Some sessions may be subject to change or cancellation if minimum of 5 attendees is not met.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Presidio Golf Course & Academy's instructors hold PGA certifications and have over 15 years of professional coaching experience, specializing in biomechanics and mental game strategies to enhance player performance.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Presidio Golf Course & Academy have secured scholarships to top golf programs at universities like Stanford and UC Berkeley, and have won regional amateur championships, showcasing their competitive edge.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The academy boasts a state-of-the-art driving range, a short game practice area, and an 18-hole championship course set amidst the scenic Presidio forest, providing a comprehensive training environment.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through bi-annual performance evaluations and personalized feedback sessions, ensuring continuous improvement and alignment with individual goals.

Name: Revolution Prep
Tagline: Get better grades and test scores with the best private tutoring, test prep, and math tutoring anywhere - Revolution Prep
About: While many colleges are now test-optional, strong SAT® or ACT® scores can still play a decisive role in admissions and scholarships—especially at competitive schools. We’ve been preparing students for college admissions tests since 2002, and we’ve found there’s only one surefire way to know which test is right for your child: take a practice test for each exam.
Philosophy: Yes, many test-optional schools still look at test scores. If you submit a strong score, it can increase your chances of success with admissions, scholarships, and program placement—especially at more competitive schools.
Outcomes: If your child is unsatisfied for any reason during the first 30 days or 6 hours (whichever comes first) of Private Tutoring, we will refund your money. Our only requirement is they attend at least one full lesson before requesting a refund.
Admissions: To enroll in Revolution Prep, visit their website to schedule a free consultation with an academic advisor. During this session, you'll discuss your child's needs and create a personalized plan.
Quote: Revolution Prep combines results-driven tutors with the latest technology to personalize support, sharpen instruction, and provide meaningful outcomes, lesson after lesson.

Performance.Competitive Pathway: The PSAT/NMSQT® (Preliminary SAT® / National Merit Scholarship Qualifying Test) is a digital exam that mirrors the SAT® in format, content, and scoring — making it the best early indicator of future SAT performance.
Performance.Academic Integration: We teach specific subjects at every grade level, but we’re proudest of something else entirely ─ developing our students into confident young adults. Our tutors are also coaches and mentors who see academic challenges as temporary obstacles.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Our skilled faculty create a personalized curriculum for your student that spends time on the things that drive outcomes the fastest - and saves time on anything your student doesn't need. Students, parents, teachers, and schools experience better results with less stress.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Our Academic Advisors are the primary point of contact for parents and counselors. They oversee the tutoring process by helping to set goals and then monitoring the effectiveness of the tutoring.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Revolution Prep in San Francisco offers a state-of-the-art online platform with interactive whiteboards and video conferencing tools for effective remote tutoring. Their virtual classrooms are equipped with digital resources for comprehensive test preparation.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Revolution Prep provides detailed progress reports and regular updates to parents, ensuring transparency and involvement in the student's learning journey. Their assessment system includes periodic evaluations to track improvements and adjust tutoring strategies accordingly.

Name: Crimson Education
Tagline: Crimson Education US offers personalized college admissions consulting with proven results for students applying to the Ivy League & top universities
About: See Our Record-Breaking Class of 2030 Results!View Now Empower ambitious students to reach their dream universities Empower ambitious students to reach their dream universities We support students applying to the Ivy League, Stanford, MIT, UChicago, Duke, and other top US universities. With 1,340+ Ivy League offers and former admissions officers on our team, Crimson delivers proven, expert guidance for ambitious students.
Philosophy: Devery studied higher education management at Harvard's Graduate School of Education in addition to serving as a Harvard admissions officer, UC Berkeley application reader, and an application reader for a top liberal arts college. Applying a strategic, data-driven approach, Devery helps students make informed choices as they tailor applications to Ivy League institutions.
Outcomes: Hundreds of Crimson students have been admitted to top colleges, including every Ivy League, Stanford, MIT, Duke, Johns Hopkins and more. Crimson students are seeing strong 2030 results, with offers from leading colleges including Harvard, Yale, and Stanford.
Admissions: To apply to Crimson Education, students typically start with a consultation to assess their goals and needs. Applications are accepted year-round, with personalized plans tailored to each student's timeline and target universities.
Quote: Culture in two words: infectious joy. At Crimson, you never work alone - you tap a collaborative brain trust of hundreds, aligning expertise around your goals and cheering your progress.

Performance.Competitive Pathway: “Hi, I’m Collier — former Harvard QB, 3x Ivy League Champion, and All-American Honorable Mention.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: “Swimming taught me discipline, balance, and leadership — lessons I carried from Dartmouth, where I captained the team, to mentoring student-athletes today.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Admits to MA, MSc, MEng, and PhDs at Stanford, Georgia Tech, Imperial, UCLA, and top global tech universities.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Crimson Education provides personalized counseling and advisory systems to support students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Community-building initiatives foster peer connections, creating a supportive environment for students throughout their college admissions journey.
Performance.Academic Integration: Crimson Education offers a tailored curriculum focusing on strategic application techniques and critical thinking. Expert-led workshops and one-on-one mentoring sessions help students develop skills needed for top university admissions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Crimson Education utilizes detailed progress reports and regular feedback sessions to track student advancement. Parents receive consistent updates, ensuring transparency and collaboration in the student's educational journey.

Name: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies
Tagline: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies offers cutting-edge programs for all grade levels. Learn more about our summer program & after-school enrichment courses!
About: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies was inaugurated by the Provost in 2012. SPCS is led by the Educational Outreach Programs division of Stanford Online High School (OHS), an accredited, diploma-offering, highly selective independent school for academically motivated students in grades 7-12.
Philosophy: Our residential staff work to support the academic and emotional needs of our summer program participants. This life-changing mentorship and teaching opportunity entices many staff members to return year after year.
Outcomes: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies participants often gain admission to top universities worldwide, leveraging enhanced critical thinking and problem-solving skills. Alumni frequently excel in STEM fields, humanities, and leadership roles.
Admissions: Prospective students apply online, typically requiring academic transcripts, teacher recommendations, and personal statements. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, with deadlines varying by program.
Quote: The residential staff fostered an inclusive environment. Their caring nature shined through in every circumstance, and whenever I had any issues, I felt comfortable going to them for help.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies faculty include PhD holders and experienced educators specializing in advanced STEM and humanities subjects. Many instructors have over a decade of teaching experience in high-achieving academic environments.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The program provides comprehensive counseling services and peer advisory systems to support student wellbeing. Dedicated residential staff facilitate community-building activities and workshops focused on emotional resilience and personal growth.
Performance.Academic Integration: Students engage in rigorous courses like Advanced Mathematics and Creative Writing, employing inquiry-based learning methods. The curriculum emphasizes critical thinking and collaborative projects, preparing participants for future academic challenges.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently gain admission to Ivy League and other top-tier universities, with many excelling in international science and math competitions. Alumni pursue successful careers in fields such as engineering, medicine, and entrepreneurship.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Students have access to state-of-the-art laboratories, modern classrooms, and a comprehensive library. The campus includes recreational facilities like swimming pools and tennis courts, enhancing the residential experience.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies employs a robust system of progress reports and parent-teacher communications. Regular assessments and feedback sessions ensure students and families are informed of academic performance and development.

Name: UC Berkeley Academic Talent Development Program
Tagline: mmunity of like-minded peers For over 40 years, ATDP has brought together passionate students from all across the Bay Area, the nation, and the world.
About: Since 1982, the program has invited excelling students from the Bay Area and around the world into a unique academic community. We look for strong students from all backgrounds who are hardworking, enjoy learning, and are prepared for an intellectually stimulating and demanding summer class.
Philosophy: ATDP remains committed to helping you make the most of your summer. This page contains comprehensive information about our Secondary Division programs for 2026.
Outcomes: Graduates of the UC Berkeley Academic Talent Development Program often gain admission to top-tier universities and excel in competitive academic fields. Many alumni have received prestigious awards and scholarships, reflecting the program's commitment to nurturing exceptional talent.
Admissions: ATDP gladly accepts applications up until the extended deadline for each program. Our extended deadlines are: We make placement decisions on a rolling basis until all spots are filled.
Quote: Empowering diverse, diligent minds to thrive in an intellectually vibrant community and reach their highest potential.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Unlike many other summer programs, ATDP offers courses that focus on acquisition of deep knowledge in a single topic. Secondary Division students are invited to immerse themselves and gain expertise in a subject that interests them.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: ATDP’s Teacher Referral Form (TRF) is a brief online form that collects feedback from your teacher, and must be completed as part of your online application before it can be submitted. It must be completed by a current teacher that instructs in any academic subject (e.g., mathematics, science, language arts; not elective, advisory, or extracurricular classes).
Performance.Academic Integration: Secondary Division courses can help meet a diverse variety of scholastic goals. Some aim to help middle school students transition to high school topics, or high school students to college-level study.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Students who have been accepted to ATDP and who applied by the early or standard postmark deadlines will receive their acceptance notification in their account and via email approximately one month later (see the program calendar). This notification will come along with our SD Student Guide, which contains important information and instructions for confirming your enrollment and preparing to attend class.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: All SD in-person courses are held on the UC Berkeley campus, which is conveniently located a short walk away from the Downtown Berkeley BART station and several AC Transit bus lines. Many families choose to carpool to campus, and information about carpools, BART meet-ups, and campus shuttles will be provided in the student’s acceptance materials.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: We request that you send final grades, but if those are not available, you may submit your most recent progress report. Do not delay submitting your application to wait for final grades; if necessary, we may ask for an updated report card after receiving your application.

Name: San Francisco Ballet School
Tagline: The oldest professional ballet school in the U.S., San Francisco Ballet School offers world-class training for all ages and levels. Learn more today!
About: San Francisco Ballet’s School Year Program trains students ages 8–18 through eight progressive levels, from foundational technique to pre-professional preparation. Students must be selected to enroll via a screening or audition, and requirements differ based on the age and skill level of the applicant.
Philosophy: San Francisco Ballet stands at an extraordinary inflection point where artistic vision, organizational transition, cultural evolution, and civic renewal converge to create a unique window of opportunity. Since 1933, SF Ballet has been both a founding voice in American ballet and a creative engine for the art form globally.
Outcomes: Graduates of San Francisco Ballet School often join prestigious ballet companies worldwide, including the San Francisco Ballet. The school has a strong track record of students winning top awards in international ballet competitions.
Admissions: Prospective students must audition to gain admission, with auditions held annually. The selection process considers age, skill level, and potential, ensuring a tailored training experience for each student.
Quote: Displays the current constituent who is logged in.
AppDeadline: March 1, so if you would like to be considered for the summe

Performance.Coaching Credentials: San Francisco Ballet School’s Summer Program welcomes dedicated ballet students, from those discovering dance to advanced students on a professional path. Classes, workshops, and sessions are led by distinguished faculty and skilled live accompanists in an environment that combines expert instruction with the energy of a world-leading ballet company.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Backstage like you’ve never seen it before. Join SF Ballet on a 2-hour walking tour of the War Memorial Opera House – a 1932 Beaux-Arts building designed by Arthur Brown.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: San Francisco Ballet opens the world of dance to children, teens, families, and adult lifelong learners through programs that inspire imagination and creativity. Our events, programs, and partnerships are designed to connect community members with the art form, artists, and productions by bringing ballet beyond the stage.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum includes courses in classical ballet, contemporary dance, and choreography, taught by experienced instructors. Emphasis is placed on developing technical proficiency and artistic expression through a structured, progressive training approach.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently secure positions with renowned ballet companies like the Paris Opera Ballet and often win prestigious awards at competitions such as the Prix de Lausanne. Many also receive scholarships to top dance conservatories worldwide.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through biannual evaluations and personalized feedback sessions. Parents receive detailed progress reports and are invited to regular meetings to discuss their child's development and achievements.

Name: San Francisco Conservatory of Music
Tagline: Music is one of the most formative and impactful avenues to advance the human experience. SFCM's pioneering curriculum draws on the bold, innovative creativity of San Francisco to provide unparalleled
About: Additional merchandise can be purchased at the AGC Box Office, open 10 AM - 5 PM Monday-Friday. Reference this flyer for available items and prices!
Philosophy: A versatile, hands-on program to compose, design, and engineer. Our performance programs give you ample room to challenge yourself and experience playing different styles of music in a variety of settings and groups.
Outcomes: Research shows music-making is an essential part of a child’s growth. It shapes minds, develops brains, unites communities, and brings joy.
Admissions: At SFCM, we are lifelong leaders and learners. As a professional music school, we are committed to providing an extraordinary education that prepares you to pursue fully engaged lives as citizens of the world.
Quote: Cutting-edge acoustics, breathtaking performance halls, and state-of-the art technology help our students create the future of music.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: A dramatic performance hall created in a renovated historic grand ballroom showcases the Conservatory’s orchestra. Internationally renowned visiting artists also perform and present master classes in this hall, which accommodates an audience of 348.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: A stunning outdoor space atop the building serves as one of the prime gathering spaces for the Conservatory community.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Conservatory’s Civic Center campus consists of the Ann Getty Center for Education, opened in 2006 at 50 Oak Street, and the Ute and William K. Center for Performing Arts, opened partially in 2020 at 200 Van Ness Avenue.
Performance.Academic Integration: While SFCM offers a focused curriculum that prepares students for a life in music, general studies in history, literature, mathematics, and other disciplines are essential to a fully transformative education. SFCM graduates are entrepreneurial, culturally informed, and articulate.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of the San Francisco Conservatory of Music have been accepted into prestigious programs at institutions like Juilliard and Yale. Alumni frequently win top prizes at international competitions such as the Tchaikovsky Competition and the Van Cliburn International Piano Competition.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The San Francisco Conservatory of Music employs a robust assessment system, providing regular progress reports and performance evaluations. Faculty engage in continuous communication with students to ensure tailored feedback and support throughout their educational journey.

Name: Well Clinic SF
Tagline: Online Therapy in San Francisco - Experience our "therapist matchmaker" service - get paired with the best clinician for your specific needs. FREE CONSULT.
About: With the guidance of external consultation, we are committed to addressing the manifestations of white supremicist culture at the clinic as well as providing financial support to anti-racism activists. Our goal is to build structure into the company that will outlive the fervor of this moment and create meaningful change while also using our position in the community to help others do the same.
Philosophy: We feel deep sorrow, regret, and humility in waking up to this and acknowledging it. We probably can not fully understand the harm that we have caused as a result, but we are engaged in learning and bring as much consciousness as we can to this ongoing process of advocating for BIPOC by committing to and being vocal about anti-racism.
Outcomes: Clients at Well Clinic SF often report improved mental health and personal growth. Many clients experience enhanced relationships and increased resilience through personalized therapy and wellness programs.
Admissions: To apply for services at Well Clinic SF, prospective clients can schedule a free consultation through their website. The clinic offers a 'therapist matchmaker' service to pair clients with the best clinician for their needs.
Quote: Empower healing and transformation through sustained commitment to diversity, equity, and support for anti-racism efforts.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Well Clinic partners with companies in our community to enrich the well being of their staff.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: These are among the basic and universal struggles facing us all right now. Mastering skills to help with perspective, understanding your stress response, and nervous system regulation, will help build a resiliency toolkit for your staff members and manage anxiety symptoms.
Performance.Academic Integration: Well Clinic SF offers personalized therapy sessions focusing on cognitive-behavioral techniques and mindfulness practices. Clinicians are highly qualified, holding advanced degrees in psychology and counseling.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Clients often achieve significant personal growth, leading to improved career prospects and enhanced professional relationships. Many report increased workplace resilience and leadership skills through tailored therapeutic interventions.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The clinic features serene therapy rooms designed for comfort and privacy, fostering a conducive environment for mental health treatment. Additionally, clients have access to a resource library with wellness literature.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Well Clinic SF employs a robust feedback system, offering regular progress updates through personalized client reports. Clinicians maintain open communication channels to ensure continuous client engagement and satisfaction.

Name: Young Performers Theatre
Tagline: trike leaves San Francisco students unsupervised, a mismatched group of kids from different schools sets off on an unexpected adventure in the Presidio.
About: Through Theatre in Education and outreach programs, repertory productions, classes and summer camps, YPT helps children build core social-emotional learning skills and sets the stage for success in many fields of endeavor outside of performance. Bringing enrichment programming to schools, child-care facilities and community centers in the Bay Area, with an emphasis on providing a range of options — from classes and workshops to fully staged productions — tailored to the youth-development needs and cultural identities of the institutions served.
Philosophy: Matilda was passionate about serving youth who lacked access to theatre arts-based enrichment opportunities. She approached theatre not just as a performance medium but as a means of improving outcomes in early childhood development through creative problem solving, teamwork, focus, empathy and self-confidence.
Outcomes: Young Performers Theatre alumni have gone on to attend prestigious universities and have successful careers in the arts. Many students have received awards for excellence in theatre and performance.
Admissions: To apply to Young Performers Theatre, prospective students must complete an online application and attend an audition. Enrollment is open year-round, but spaces are limited and fill quickly.
Quote: Empowering young hearts through theater to build skills, inspire creativity, and illuminate paths to future success.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Young Performers Theatre employs instructors with degrees in theatre arts and education, many holding over a decade of teaching experience. Staff members are certified in child development and specialize in drama-based learning techniques.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Young Performers Theatre offers a dedicated student advisory program, providing personalized guidance and support. Regular workshops focus on building resilience, emotional intelligence, and peer collaboration, fostering a nurturing community environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum includes courses in improvisation, script analysis, and stagecraft, emphasizing experiential learning. Students engage in project-based activities that integrate core academic subjects with theatre arts, enhancing critical thinking skills.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates have been accepted into top-tier institutions like Juilliard and NYU Tisch School of the Arts. Alumni frequently win regional theatre competitions, showcasing their exceptional talent and training.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Young Performers Theatre boasts a state-of-the-art black box theater and multiple rehearsal studios. The facility includes costume and prop workshops, providing comprehensive resources for diverse theatrical productions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is monitored through bi-annual performance reviews and personalized feedback sessions. Parents receive detailed progress reports and are invited to regular meetings to discuss student development.

Name: San Francisco Girls Chorus
Tagline: The mission of the San Francisco Girls Chorus is to create outstanding performances featuring the unique and compelling sound of young women’s voices through an exemplary music education program.
About: San Francisco Girls Chorus prepares girls and young women from diverse backgrounds for success, on stage and in life, through rigorous, empowering music education, and enriches Bay Area cultural life through innovative vocal performance. The vision of the San Francisco Girls Chorus is to produce performances of the highest artistic caliber; to provide music education for girls and young women from all ethnic and socio-economic backgrounds; to be a leader in the field through creativity and innovation; to give the girls and young women who participate in Chorus programs the skills, self-discipline and confidence to succeed in music and in life; and to instill in the choristers a lifelong love of music; and to communicate this passion through involvement with the greater community.
Philosophy: The San Francisco Girls Chorus is proud to offer a comprehensive music education and performance program for singers ages 4-18. We offer rehearsals in San Francisco at the Kanbar Performing Arts Center and in Emeryville at the East Bay German International School.
Outcomes: San Francisco Girls Chorus alumnae have gone on to attend prestigious universities such as Stanford and Juilliard. The chorus has received multiple Grammy Awards and has performed at renowned venues worldwide.
Admissions: Prospective members can apply through an audition process held annually, typically in the spring. Applicants are evaluated on vocal ability, musicality, and potential for growth within the program.
Quote: Empowering young voices to harmonize diversity and innovation, transforming lives through the transcendent power of music.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Recognizing the unique opportunities for personal growth which are inherent in a residence camp experience, the Chorus holds a Music Camp each summer. Choristers are involved in a rigorous music program interspersed with recreational activities that the choristers look forward to every year.
Performance.Academic Integration: Host your rehearsal, board meeting, special event, or business retreat at the Kanbar Performing Arts Center (KPAC). Located at 44 Page Street in San Francisco's vibrant Civic Center/Hayes Valley neighborhood, we offer multiple spaces of varying sizes available for short-term and recurring rentals.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: SFGC is proud to offer tuition assistance for our regular school-year programming, made possible by the Elizabeth Avakian Scholarship Fund. Our Tuition Assistance Application for the 2026-27 school year will be open from March - April 2026.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: San Francisco Girls Chorus supports student wellbeing through a dedicated advisory system that provides personalized guidance and fosters a supportive community. Regular workshops focus on mental health, resilience, and stress management strategies.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The San Francisco Girls Chorus operates from the Kanbar Performing Arts Center, featuring state-of-the-art rehearsal studios and performance spaces. Additional resources include a music library and access to professional recording equipment.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is tracked through biannual assessments and detailed feedback sessions with instructors. Parents receive comprehensive progress reports and are invited to regular meetings to discuss their child's development and achievements.

Name: Alonzo King LINES Ballet
Tagline: Alonzo King LINES Ballet | A world-renowned trailblazer, contemporary dance company, education and artistic hub in San Francisco.
About: was created with the purpose of touching hearts and stirring minds through dance. As an organization, Alonzo King LINES Ballet Alonzo King LINES Ballet embraces a spirit of inquiry and openness to change combined with a reverence for legacy and history.
Philosophy: Alonzo King LINES Ballet embraces a spirit of inquiry and openness to change combined with a reverence for legacy and history. The mission and purpose of Alonzo King LINES Ballet is to nurture artistry and the development of creative expression in dance, through collaboration, performance, and education.
Outcomes: Graduates of Alonzo King LINES Ballet often join prestigious dance companies worldwide, and many have been recognized with awards for their artistic excellence. The program fosters strong technical skills and creative expression, leading to successful careers in dance.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply to Alonzo King LINES Ballet through an audition process, which typically includes a live or video audition. Applications are accepted on a rolling basis, but early submission is encouraged due to limited spots.
Quote: Cultivating the gifts of developing dancers. One step at a time.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: LINES provides regular professional development for classroom and studio educators of all levels and experiences.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: LINES Community Programs provide students with access to the creative process of Alonzo King LINES Ballet. Rooted in our unique HeART with LINES curriculum emphasizing humility, empathy, artistry, ritual, and truth, LINES Community Programming benefits a child’s physical wellness and imagination through the power of discovery and collaboration.
Performance.Academic Integration: Designed for youth in Grades 5 through Middle School, our camp explores dance using our HeART with LINES curriculum, rooted in humility, empathy, artistry, ritual, and truth. No experience necessary, only a willingness to try!
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Alonzo King LINES Ballet often secure positions in renowned companies like the San Francisco Ballet and Royal Ballet. Many alumni have also received accolades such as the Princess Grace Award for their exceptional artistry.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The state-of-the-art facilities at Alonzo King LINES Ballet include spacious studios with sprung floors and a dedicated performance theater. Students have access to a comprehensive library of dance literature and multimedia resources.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at Alonzo King LINES Ballet is meticulously tracked through biannual evaluations and personalized feedback sessions. Regular parent-teacher meetings ensure transparent communication and collaborative support for student development.
